name: Beef Pares
description: Tender braised beef simmered in a rich, savory-sweet sauce and served with flavorful broth and steamed rice for a comforting Filipino favorite.

name: Lomi
description: A hearty Filipino noodle soup made with thick egg noodles, savory broth, vegetables, and your choice of delicious toppings.

name: Shrimp Wonton Soup
description: Delicate shrimp-filled wontons served in a warm, flavorful broth with fresh vegetables for a light yet satisfying meal.
